parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "mistral-small", messages: [ { role: "system", content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.user_prompt } ], stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.3, num_predict: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "mistral:latest", messages: [ { role: "system", content: $json.reviewer.includes("quality") ? "You are a strict quality reviewer. Evaluate the following output for accuracy, completeness, tone, and style. You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"verdict": "APPROVE" or "REJECT", "score": 1-10, "feedback": "specific feedback"}. Be critical. Only APPROVE if score >= 7. Do NOT include any text before or after the JSON." : "You are a resolution reviewer. Check if the output fully addresses the original request. Verify completeness, no omissions, no hallucinations. You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"verdict": "APPROVE" or "REJECT", "score": 1-10, "feedback": "specific feedback"}. Be critical. Only APPROVE if score >= 7. Do NOT include any text before or after the JSON." }, { role: "user", content: "Task type: " + $json.task_type + "
Original request: " + $json.source_text.substring(0, 2000) + "

Output to review:
" + $json.execution_result.substring(0, 4000) } ], stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 1024 } }) }}
